title: Note diplomatique informant de l'adhésion andorrane et de l'adhésion de Nauru
text_preview: The Secretary of State presents his compliments to Their Excellencies and Mesdames and Messieurs the Chiefs of Mission of the governments concerned with the Convention of the World Meteorological Organization, which was done at Washington on October 11, 1947, as amended (the "Convention"'), and for which the United States of America is the depositary government. pages.text:
The Secretary of State presents his compliments to Their Excellencies and

Mesdames and Messieurs the Chiefs of Mission of the governments concerned with the Convention of the World Meteorological Organization, which was done at

Washington on October 11, 1947, as amended (the "Convention"'), and for which the United States of America is the depositary government.

In performance of depositary duties, the Secretary of State has the honor to inform the Chiefs of Mission that in accordance with the provisions of Articles 3(b)

and 33 of the Convention, the Principality of Andorra deposited an instrument of accession to the Convention on October 17, 2018, and the Republic of Nauru deposited an instrument of accession to the Convention on April 16, 2019.

In accordance with the provisions of Article 35 of the Convention, the

Convention entered into force for the Principality of Andorra on November 16, 2018, and the Convention entered into force for the Republic of Nauru on May 16, 2019.

The Secretary of State would be grateful if the Chiefs of Mission would communicate this information to their respective governments.

Department of State,

Washington, December 23, 2019.

DIPLOMATIC NOTE

n
